root_cause.behavior: When an incoming job has an existing record in job-records.json (existing.id is truthy), the published/public_visibility/status flags are preserved from the existing record, ignoring the incoming job's values.
root_cause.impact: The auto-publish script's buildPublicJobShape() sets published=true, public_visibility=true, status='active' on the public job object, but syncJobRecordStore -> buildJobRecord ignores these for records that already exist in job-records.json (e.g., from pending triage).

fix_applied.description: After syncJobRecordStore, patched the record directly in job-records.json to set published=true, public_visibility=true, status='published'
fix_applied.in_script: pay-gated-autopublish.js now includes a post-sync fixup loop that corrects records for all publishedIds
fix_applied.details: The post-sync fix reads job-records.json, finds records matching publishedIds, and forces their flags to published=true, public_visibility=true, status='published'
